title: How to build a continuous evaluation pipeline for multi-agent systems with Gemini
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates how to build a continuous evaluation pipeline for multi-agent AI systems using Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform and Cloud Run. The pipeline implements data-driven assessment with adaptive rubrics, shadow deployments, and CI/CD automation to detect regressions in agent quality.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through building a continuous evaluation pipeline for multi-agent AI systems using the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform and Cloud Run. The pipeline applies data-driven assessment with adaptive rubrics, shadow deployments, and CI/CD automation to catch regressions in agent quality. The core takeaway: evaluation runs continuously as part of the deployment workflow rather than as a one-off check, so quality changes surface before they reach production.
